Show a remote player's current hand while hovering or selecting them with a controller.
Controls how large cards appear in the hover preview.
Controls how many cards are shown before the preview wraps to a new row.
Moves the hand preview horizontally from its default position. Positive values move it right.
Moves the hand preview vertically from its default position. Positive values move it down.
Lock the currently hovered remote hand preview, or unlock it. Defaults to Ctrl+H on keyboard and left stick press on controller.
